tool_input.command:
git commit --author="Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>" -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
refactor: consolidate cognitive loop into library and cleanup redundant modules

- Move ELMAgent from src/loop.rs to src/agent.rs and expose as a library module
- Correct import paths in src/agent.rs and src/main.rs
- Remove redundant top-level files src/bank.rs and src/environment.rs to prevent module shadowing
- Clean up redundant mod declarations in src/main.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push origin main
